pi_items.source: task.json description specifies saving report as Combo_Reference_Report.pbix on Desktop
Follows standard naming pattern from other Power BI tasks (e.g., sales_kpi_result.json). Referenced in verifier.py line 46.
task.json description explicitly specifies: Total_Revenue = SUM of Sales_Amount, Avg_Discount_Pct = AVERAGE of Discount
Power BI visual type for 'Line and Clustered Column Chart' as specified in task.json description. Verified in export_result.ps1 from similar tasks.
task.json description explicitly states: Rename the report page to 'Monthly Performance'

task.json description explicitly specifies two constant lines: 50000 (revenue target) and 0.15 (15% max discount threshold). Data validation: Monthly revenue ranges 19,328-476,093 (mean 386,097), so 50000 is reasonable monthly target. Discount ranges 0.0-0.30 (mean 0.1524, median 0.15), so 0.15 is reasonable threshold.

File confirmed to exist at power_bi_desktop_env/data/sales_data.csv. Referenced in task.json description. Setup pattern from sales_kpi_dashboard setup_task.ps1 copies from C:\workspace\data\sales_data.csv to PowerBITasks directory.
Python analysis of sales_data.csv: wc -l shows 1001 lines (1000 data rows + 1 header row)
Python pandas analysis: Sale_Date column ranges from 2023-01-01 (earliest) to 2024-01-01 (latest)
Python pandas analysis of Sales_Amount column from sales_data.csv
Python pandas analysis of Discount column from sales_data.csv
Python pandas groupby analysis: aggregated Sales_Amount by year-month from sales_data.csv

critical_issues.details: task.json references 'pre_task' hook pointing to C:\workspace\tasks\combo_reference_analysis\setup_task.ps1, but this file does not exist in the task directory.
task.json references 'post_task' hook pointing to C:\workspace\tasks\combo_reference_analysis\export_result.ps1, but this file does not exist in the task directory.

privileged_info_summary: The combo_reference_analysis task requires creating a Power BI report using sales_data.csv (1000 synthetic records, 2023-2024). The task specifies two DAX measures (Total_Revenue, Avg_Discount_Pct), a Line-and-Clustered-Column combo chart with month grain on the X-axis, and two constant reference lines at 50000 (monthly revenue target, reasonable given mean monthly revenue of 386,097) and 0.15 (discount threshold, matching the median discount of 0.1524). The output file Combo_Reference_Report.pbix should be saved on the Desktop, and the report page must be named 'Monthly Performance'. Data is synthetic with 5 salespeople, 4 regions, 4 product categories, and 2 customer types. CRITICAL: The required setup_task.ps1 and export_result.ps1 hook files are missing from the task directory.
